message:
fix(llm): address review issues in retry and stream-timeout

- Fix jitter range: RANDOM(0.5,1.0) -> RANDOM(0.5,1.5) per spec
- Abort during retry delay now throws AbortError, not the original error
- isRetryable checks error's retryable property before status codes
- Add Retry-After header support per spec Section 6.6
- Make retryLLMCall generic (not locked to Response type)
- Add missing non-retryable status codes 413 and 422
- Add maxDelayMs cap test
- Fix misleading retryable status code comment

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
